## Runtime.Indexers.FillingRecipeIndexerOrchestrator class

Orchestrator for filling recipe indexers.

Encapsulates all filling recipe-related indexers and provides a unified find interface. The resolver is provided by the RuntimeContext to enable ID-to-entity resolution.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class FillingRecipeIndexerOrchestrator extends BaseIndexerOrchestrator<IRuntimeFillingRecipe, FillingId> 
```
**Extends:** [BaseIndexerOrchestrator](./ts-chocolate.runtime.indexers.baseindexerorchestrator.md)<!-- -->&lt;[IRuntimeFillingRecipe](./ts-chocolate.runtime.iruntimefillingrecipe.md)<!-- -->, [FillingId](./ts-chocolate.fillingid.md)<!-- -->&gt;
